pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler plugin version to a newer snapshot release.
Set Maven compiler source level to Java 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: Code using Java 17 features (e.g., sealed classes, pattern matching) will fail to compile if source level remains at 11.

pom.xml.general_idea: Set Maven compiler target level to Java 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: Generated bytecode will be incompatible with Java 17 runtime expectations or fail to compile if target remains at 11.
